case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR''S OFFICE VS. KATHRINE JAVIER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-21-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DORIAN GIN, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DORAN GIN, SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
